paymentlinks: Description: Stores all payment link requests created by users, including amounts, currencies, transaction metadata, status, and audit details. Each entry occurs when a user initiates a payment link via web or app.
(paymentlinks) _id (ObjectId): Unique identifier for the payment link document.
(paymentlinks) userId (ObjectId, required): Reference to the user who created the payment link. Refers to MODEL_USER.
(paymentlinks) appId (ObjectId | null, default: null): Reference to the API or app that created the payment link. Refers to MODEL_API. **NOTE: Only fetch details where appId= null**
(paymentlinks) cryptoTransactionId (ObjectId | null, default: null): Reference to a related crypto transaction, if any.
(paymentlinks) orderId (String | null): Optional order identifier for reference.
(paymentlinks) currency (String, required): The currency used in the payment link.
(paymentlinks) currencyId (ObjectId | null): Reference to the token used. Refers to MODEL_TOKEN.
(paymentlinks) chainId (ObjectId | null): Reference to the blockchain network for this payment.
(paymentlinks) currencyName (String, required): Name of the currency involved.
(paymentlinks) chain (String | null): Blockchain code or identifier.
(paymentlinks) chainName (String | null): Name of the blockchain network.
(paymentlinks) amount (String, required): Amount requested in the payment link.
(paymentlinks) userAmount (String | null): Amount attributed to the user after any fees.
(paymentlinks) adminCommissionAmount (String | null): Commission taken by the admin.
(paymentlinks) expireTime (String, required): Expiration time of the payment link.
(paymentlinks) email (String | null): Email of the recipient, if applicable.
(paymentlinks) adminAssetAddress (String | null): Admin wallet address for processing.
(paymentlinks) requestIp (String | null): IP address from which the link was created.
(paymentlinks) callbackStatus (Number, default: 0): Callback execution status (0=pending).
(paymentlinks) depositStatus (Number, default: 0): Deposit execution status (0=pending).
(paymentlinks) callBackDate (String | null): Timestamp when callback was executed.
(paymentlinks) retries (Number | null): Number of callback retries attempted.
(paymentlinks) link (String | null): Actual payment link URL.
(paymentlinks) status (Number, default: 0): Payment link status (0=pending, 1=success, 2=failed, 3=expired).
(paymentlinks) receiverCurrencyAddress (String | null): Address of the receiver for cryptocurrency payments.
(paymentlinks) privateKey (String | null): Private key used for the transaction.
(paymentlinks) encryptedKey (String | null): Encrypted key for secure operations.
(paymentlinks) tag (String | null): Optional tag for transaction categorization.
(paymentlinks) chainCurrencyName (String, required): Currency name on the chain.
(paymentlinks) contractAddress (String, required): Smart contract address used for the transaction.
(paymentlinks) transactionId (String, required): Identifier for the transaction.
(paymentlinks) subscriptionId (String, required): Subscription ID associated with the payment link.
(paymentlinks) fireblockTransactionId (String | null): Transaction ID from Fireblocks integration.
(paymentlinks) txId (String, required): Blockchain transaction ID.
(paymentlinks) payData (Array of Objects | null): Array of payment execution details.
(paymentlinks.payData.txId) (String | null): Transaction ID for each sub-payment.
(paymentlinks.payData.amount) (Number | null): Amount of each sub-payment.
(paymentlinks.payData.date) (Date | null): Date of each sub-payment.
(paymentlinks) sender (String | null): Sender information.
(paymentlinks) transactionType (Number, default: 0): Type of transaction (1=withdraw, 2=deposit).
(paymentlinks) usdAmount (Number, default: 0): Amount in USD equivalent.
(paymentlinks) usdUserAmount (Number, default: 0): User's amount in USD equivalent.
(paymentlinks) transactionConfirmationDate (Date | null): Timestamp when the transaction was confirmed.
(paymentlinks) isPaymentLimit (Boolean, default: false): Flag indicating if the link is subject to payment limits.
(paymentlinks) isExpired (Number, default: false): Flag indicating whether the link has expired.
(paymentlinks) alert (Number, default: 0): Alert flag for administrative purposes.
(paymentlinks) isProceed (Number, default: 0): Processing flag (0=pending, 1=completed).
(paymentlinks) createdAt (Date): Timestamp when the payment link was created.
(paymentlinks) updatedAt (Date): Timestamp of the last update to the payment link document.
